name: Cool n Easy Tropical Lime Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Stir boiling water into JELL-O in a large bowl for 2 minutes or until dissolved.
2. Mix Schnapps, cold water, and ice to make 1 1/4 cups.
3. Gradually add the mixture to gelatin, stirring until slightly thickened (consistency of unbeaten egg whites).
4. Remove any remaining ice.
5. Stir in Cool Whip with a wire whisk until smooth.
6. Refrigerate for 10 to 15 minutes or until the mixture is very thick and will mound.
7. Spoon into crust.
8. Refrigerate for 4 hours or until firm.
9. Garnish with lime slices and Cool Whip, just before serving.
